records.ety: [OE. estoveir, estovoir, necessity, provisions, properly an inf., “to be necessary.” Cf. Estovers.]

defs: Fodder for cattle, especially straw or coarse hay.
quotes: Where live nibbling sheep, And flat meads thatched with stover them to keep.
Thresh barley as yet but as need shall require, Fresh threshed for stover thy cattle desire.
